user_story: As an HR admin, I want to browse reports grouped by category such as Employee Management and Recruitment, so that I can find the report I need quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reports screen; When the page loads; Then reports are listed under their category headings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to open Employee Management reports like Skills, Attrition and Exit reports, so that I can analyze workforce data
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reports screen; When I select an Employee Management report; Then that report opens

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to access recruitment reports such as Open Vacancies and Interview Schedule, so that I can track hiring performance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reports screen; When I select a Recruitment report; Then that report opens

user_story: As a Manager, I want to access attendance and leave reports such as Attendance Report and Leave Summary, so that I can monitor team compliance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reports screen; When I select an attendance or leave report; Then that report opens

user_story: As a Manager, I want to access performance and resource reports such as Employee Performance and Resource Utilization, so that I can evaluate productivity
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Reports screen; When I select a performance or resource report; Then that report opens
